title: Ananassa semiserrata
taxonomy: Ananassa semiserrata is a species of bromeliad, a type of flowering plant native to South America. The genus Ananassa is closely related to the genus Ananas, which includes the pineapple. Ananassa semiserrata is not as widely cultivated as the pineapple, but it is still grown in some regions for its unique characteristics.
